case_title: OPORTUN, INC, VS. HUGO LEONEL TEJADA VASQUEZ

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-06-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT HUGO LEONEL TEJADA VASQUEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC, AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, HUGO LEONEL TEJADA CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-06-2019 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC,
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC, AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, HUGO LEONEL TEJADA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
